title: MADM-003 A Close Relatives Lesbian Family A love-hate drama of a close relatives lesbian where three mothers and daughters and a woman are intertwined... - Hitomi Enjo
overview: A love-hate drama of a close relative lesbian encountered by an office lady who lives in a matrilineal family! ! 'Ayaka', whose mother disappeared due to a large amount of debt, is allowed to live with her best friend 'Annan'. 'Ayaka' witnesses her mother 'Hitomi' caressing her eldest daughter 'Annan' in the bedroom... The second daughter 'Nanase' is disturbed by the forbidden relationship between her mother and older sister. . At the midnight lesbian ceremony, the mother forces the sisters to take a lesbian pledge, and in order to end the family's abnormal relationship, 'Ayaka' confronts 'Hitomi' with lesbian SEX! ! Perverted love out of common sense where three mothers and daughters are intertwined! !
